text:
>>Ah... so no other messages... ok..
Correct, no other messages.

>>Same place every time?
Unknown at this point.  I'll update after the next reboot.

This message is only occurring on one box,  Another (older) machine running the same FreeBSD version and identical USB peripherals does not display the message.  Both machines are using an unpowered USB hub to connect mouse and keyboard.
